C0.name: Integration Coordinator
completedDeliverables: Shared TypeScript types with Zod runtime validation for all 8 domain types
API contract types for all 9 endpoints
Edge function shells for all 10 endpoints + health-check
Architecture docs, service boundary docs, API reference, feature flags doc, event versioning doc
caveats: Work has NOT been committed to git yet
Edge function runtime propagation issue (see deployment section)

functions.summary: All 11 functions are registered as 'active' in the InsForge API and their code is correctly stored. However, the Deno Subhosting runtime only serves the 2 originally deployed functions (health-check, feed). New functions and code updates are NOT propagating to the runtime.

bugsDiscoveredAndFixed.title: Edge functions used wrong export pattern
bugsDiscoveredAndFixed.description: Initially used Deno.serve(async (req) => {...}) instead of export default async function(req: Request): Promise<Response>

bugsDiscoveredAndFixed.title: SDK createClient used wrong API
bugsDiscoveredAndFixed.description: Used createClient(url, key, opts) positional args instead of createClient({ baseUrl, anonKey/edgeFunctionToken })

bugsDiscoveredAndFixed.title: edgeFunctionToken: null causes INVALID_INPUT on deploy
bugsDiscoveredAndFixed.description: InsForge deployment validator rejects null values for edgeFunctionToken. Fixed by adding early !userToken guard that returns 401 before createClient() is called, ensuring token is always a string when passed.

openIssues.title: Deno Subhosting runtime not propagating new functions or code updates
openIssues.description: The InsForge Deno Subhosting runtime is frozen at the state from the initial deployment. Only health-check and feed are served by the runtime. All 9 other functions return 404 with available:[health-check,feed]. Code updates to existing functions also do not propagate. The deployedAt timestamp never changes on PUT. Deleting and re-creating functions does not help. Waited 10+ minutes with no change.
openIssues.impact: Cannot live-test authenticated endpoints or the 9 new function shells. Does NOT block local development or downstream agent work since contracts and code are correct.
workarounds: Code correctness verified via 'functions code <slug>' CLI command
Database layer fully functional and verified via SQL queries
health-check function responds at runtime (with old code)
suggestedActions: Check if this is a known InsForge platform issue
Contact InsForge support about runtime refresh/rebuild
Try creating a fresh project and redeploying all functions
Check if there is a deployment webhook or manual trigger

todosForRevisit.title: Commit C0 work to git
todosForRevisit.description: All C0 work is on branch c0/contract-lock but nothing has been committed. Git status shows all files as untracked or modified. Commit before proceeding to Wave 2.

todosForRevisit.title: Resolve edge function runtime propagation
todosForRevisit.description: The Deno Subhosting runtime is not serving new functions or updated code. All 11 function shells need to be live-testable before downstream agents depend on them. See ISSUE-001.

todosForRevisit.title: Live-test all 10 endpoint shells end-to-end
todosForRevisit.description: Once ISSUE-001 is resolved: invoke each function via CLI, verify (1) unauthenticated requests get 401, (2) wrong HTTP methods get 405, (3) authenticated requests get 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED. This validates the auth + routing + shell pattern before downstream agents fill in logic.

todosForRevisit.title: Verify PersonaEvent discriminated union Zod schema completeness
todosForRevisit.description: PersonaEvent has 7 payload types as a discriminated union. Verify the Zod schema correctly discriminates all 7 types at runtime and rejects malformed payloads. This is the most complex schema and downstream agents (A3, B2) depend on it heavily.

todosForRevisit.title: Validate SQL schema alignment with Zod types
todosForRevisit.description: Cross-check that all SQL table columns match the Zod schema field names and types. Specifically verify JSONB columns (payload, preferences, hard_filters, etc.) will store the nested structures defined in the Zod schemas without data loss.

todosForRevisit.title: Add RLS policies to database tables
todosForRevisit.description: No Row Level Security policies have been created yet. Before Wave 2 agents write data, tables need RLS policies restricting users to their own data (persona_events, persona_snapshots, learning_answers, etc.).

todosForRevisit.title: Review edge function CORS headers consistency
todosForRevisit.description: Verify all edge functions use identical CORS header patterns. Currently health-check uses different allowed methods than authenticated functions. Standardize before iOS client integration.

wave2.notes: Contracts are locked. Downstream agents can begin once C0 work is committed. The runtime propagation issue (ISSUE-001) does not block local development. Agents A1-A4 can build against the shared package types and SQL schemas.

A1_platform_backend.notes: Needs to scaffold backend services that implement the edge function shells

A2_identity_consent.notes: Auth flows, linked identities, deletion pipeline

A3_event_store.notes: Event persistence, snapshot rebuild, replay engine
